response.justification: Bogdan has extensive fullstack experience with TypeScript, React, Node.js, and AWS — aligning with core requirements — but his seniority (Staff/Senior roles since 2014) vastly exceeds the entry-level scope, raising concerns about fit, retention, and salary expectations; his German language barrier and lack of explicit PostgreSQL/Nest.js exposure are notable gaps for a role requiring high on-site collaboration in Berlin.
strengths: Strong TypeScript and React experience across multiple production systems
Proven fullstack ownership with AWS, Docker, and CI/CD infrastructure
Active open-source contributions and technical communication skills
concerns: Overqualified for entry-level role; likely to leave quickly or demand senior compensation
No explicit mention of PostgreSQL or Nest.js — key preferred tech stack
Basic German proficiency may hinder on-site collaboration in Berlin
